name: Cheddar Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chicken stock.
2. Melt 3 tablespoons butter; sauté carrots and onions until tender.
3. Add the vegetables and sautéed onions to the broth.
4. Make a white roux with 2 tablespoons butter and 4 tablespoons flour, then add it to the stock.
5. Stir in the cheddar cheese, parsley, ham, and 1 drop of Tabasco sauce. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Heat until the cheese is melted.
7. Top with bacon bits before serving.
Makes 4 servings (8-ounce each).
